race.comment: PRINCESS MESS (8) was too good for a maiden field when resuming last start over 1300m at Wangaratta, scoring by 1.75 lengths. Is lightly raced and has plenty of scope for improvement. Finds another nice race and can keep the ball rolling. MATROOSHI (11) has not appeared since she finished 14th over 1400m at Terang on December 16. Best form reads well, can figure prominently. SIMPLY SASSY (13) is close to a win after a sequence of strong results, the latest when second over 1307m at this track. In the mix again, keep safe. TRIOMPHE (14) was in the placings again last time when 2.5 lengths adrift in third over 1300m at Ararat. Should be right there again.
